summary: Comprehensive E2E testing completed for AI + Computer Unplugged Learning Platform MVP. Both backend APIs and frontend user flows tested successfully with excellent results.

User Registration & Authentication (Student, Parent, Teacher roles)
Activity Library Display (18 activities properly seeded)
Activity Detail Pages with Instructions & Learning Objectives

Points & Time Tracking (10 points per activity, 15min time)
Student Dashboard with Progress Stats Display
